title: Space Weaponization and Space Security: A Chinese Perspective
summary: "...China is worried about how U.S. space weaponization plans might affect Chinese national security, international security, and protection of the space environment...."
body: Note An extended version of this paper was produced for the American Academy of Arts and Sciences project, Reconsidering the Rules of Space .
